caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap and a matching green t-shirt sits in a studio, speaking into a large black microphone on a stand. His shirt features the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" with "SHIT" in larger, bold letters. He wears black over-ear headphones and is positioned in a room filled with framed photographs on the wall behind him and clothing racks nearby. A white mannequin wearing a white shirt stands in the background. Small logos, including "NO FLY ZONE," appear in the lower corners of the scene. As the clip progresses, the man's facial expressions shift; he begins by looking forward with a neutral expression, then opens his mouth to speak, briefly looks down and to the side, and ends with a slight smile and squint of his eyes. The camera remains stationary throughout the sequence.
